title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Chile SEC product and installation controls, CNE / Coordinador grid requirements, UN 38.3 transport expectations, and IEC-based project specifications.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与智利SEC产品及安装管理、CNE/Coordinador并网要求、UN 38.3运输要求及IEC项目技术规格差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與智利SEC產品及安裝管理、CNE/Coordinador併網要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及IEC項目技術規格差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC scope determination, grid-connection approval, environmental or municipal permit decision, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, EPC contractors, and owners should verify current Chile SEC, CNE, Coordinador Electrico Nacional, transport, fire-safety, environmental, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, interconnection, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC适用范围裁定、并网批准、环境或市政许可决定、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、EPC承包商和业主在出货、并网或投运前，应与合格专业人士核验现行智利SEC、CNE、国家电力协调机构、运输、消防安全、环境及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC適用範圍裁定、併網批准、環境或市政許可決定、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、EPC承包商和業主在出貨、併網或投運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利SEC、CNE、國家電力協調機構、運輸、消防安全、環境及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Chile, there is no single official whole-unit BESS certificate that should be assumed mandatory for every project. The core gap is scope determination: SEC certification or authorization may apply to listed electrical products and components, Chilean electrical-installation rules apply at site level, UN 38.3 supports lithium-battery transport, and utility-scale projects must satisfy CNE / Coordinador Electrico Nacional connection, operation, and grid-performance requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口智利时，不应假定所有项目均存在单一、统一的整机BESS强制证书。核心差距是适用范围判定：列入范围的电气产品和部件可能需要SEC认证或销售授权，智利电气安装规则适用于现场层面，UN 38.3支持锂电池运输，大型项目还必须满足CNE/国家电力协调机构的接入、运行和电网性能要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口智利時，不應假定所有項目均存在單一、統一的整機BESS強制證書。核心差距是適用範圍判定：列入範圍的電氣產品和部件可能需要SEC認證或銷售授權，智利電氣安裝規則適用於現場層面，UN 38.3支持鋰電池運輸，大型項目還必須滿足CNE/國家電力協調機構的接入、運行和電網性能要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
